title: Stussy Betrays CP0
description: On pages 13–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #12, Vegapunk, Unknown person #13, Kid, Unknown person #14, Luffy as CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.
scene: CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: AYAA AAAA!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: From Fabrio phase to lab phase

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: AAAAAAA AAAH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: 32 seconds...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Inside lab phase

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: You have arrived.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: That was fast!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Sub segment trips are can- called.

dialogue.speaker: Vegapunk
dialogue.text: Fortifying the egghead Frontier Dome.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: INTRUDER ALERT.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When all of the researchers are inside the factory, the factory will initiate Lockdown.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: In a way, he's common- dable.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: He fulfilled his duty...

dialogue.speaker: Kid
dialogue.text: As vega- punk's body- guard.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Too bad...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: SENTO- MARU!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've been ordered to wait for the marines.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we wait, they will most likely escape...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Are you really being targeted?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're the smartest man alive, right? Won't you be an asset loss for the government?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Lab phase

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What, you think the smartest man alive will be hostile against you?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't have any intention of being like that.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah, you're right. He's just gonna be dead weight. Eliminate him.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Don't easily say "elminate him"!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: On a time like this, an Emperor's crew arrived at this place. I can only think of it as fate.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh! You're gonna take a ride in our ship? You are more than welcome to!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: What? He'll just be a burden...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Please take a look at general frankly! The sunny too while you're at it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey! If that's the case, remove these foot shackles from us, you insolent man!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Mazing! What is this place?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Medical treatment and repairs for master atlas, ASAP!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Ah, I'll leave it to you guys.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Bonney! Where are you going?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Block every escape route from the island!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Yes, sir!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we include the main body, there are six left, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, the defense system is quite for- middle.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Cool!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I won't let a single soul escape from this island!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If vegapunk ignores me about restoring my dad back to normal...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Then killing him is the only option!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: That's just venting out your anger!

dialogue.speaker: Lucci
dialogue.text: So the straw hat crew...

dialogue.speaker: Kid
dialogue.text: ...became vega- punk's allies!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That means it's going to be easy for them to escape...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I suspect things aren't going to go the way they think.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Proceed as planned!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Bring as many Warships as possible to egghead!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Supreme Military Strength of the Marines, approaches!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Under Siege through 50 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
